prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为7166→6542→4968→5531→5522，整体呈波动中前移趋势，2023年达到近年最高点（4968名）后2024年回落至5531名，2025年基本 持平于5522名，近两年趋于稳定；该校在青海省物理类招生计划2021年15人、2022年17人、2023年22人、2024年18人、2025年32人，2026年计划31人，较 2025年小幅缩招1人，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年升至第61名，近年排名持续上升（2021年第68→2022年第6 9→2023年第72→2024年第69→2025年第66→2026年第61），学校综合实力稳步提升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理争议，但事件多为中性舆情；抖音热度排名第38位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度有所升温；历史投档异常记录中未见西南大学有明显断档信号；西南大学拥有心理学A、教 育学A、马克思主义理论A-等优势学科，在师范类院校中实力突出，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程等工科专业持续高 热，西南大学物理类招生专业涵盖电子信息类、机械类、电气工程等热门方向；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人（不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约30672人，与2025年基本持 平，2025年物理类本科批350分，较2024年理科一段343分略有上升；西南大学位于重庆市（西南地区），在青海省招生占比极小（约0.4%）， 属于跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年趋于稳定、2026年物理类小幅缩招1人、软科排名持续上升提升学校吸引力、抖音热度较热反映关 注升温等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年5522名基础上略有前移（竞争加剧）；预测最低位次约5368名，区间4868–5868名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 7166 → 6542 → 4968 → 5531 → 5522, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend. The highest point in recent years was in 2023 (4968th), after which it fell back to 5531st in 2024, and remained basically stable at 5522nd in 2025, stabilizing in the last two years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Qinghai Province was 15 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 32 in 2025, and 31 in 2026, a slight reduction of 1 compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking rose to 61st in 2026, with rankings continuously improving in recent years (68th in 2021 → 69th in 2022 → 72nd in 2023 → 69th in 2024 → 66th in 2025 → 61st in 2026), reflecting steady enhancement of overall strength. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management, but the incidents are mostly neutral public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating increased attention for applications. Historical abnormal admission records show no obvious signal of score gaps for Southwest University. Southwest University has advantageous disciplines such as Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-), standing out among normal universities, which attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular. Southwest University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 30,672 in Physics Category based on historical proportions, basically unchanged from 2025. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 350 points, slightly up from 343 points for Science Section 1 in 2024. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (Southwest China), with a very small enrollment proportion in Qinghai (about 0.4%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in the last two years, a slight reduction of 1 in Physics Category enrollment for 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing university appeal, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 ranking of 5522 (due to intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is about 5368, with a range of 4868–5868.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (4868–5868), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<4868), you can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>5868), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors and pay attention to the enrollment plan of Rongchang Campus.
